docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, WITH NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO RESET AND SERVE THE DEFENDANT WITH NEW HEARING DATE. (506)
